full_text:
Lady Huan 環夫人
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Huan (環夫人)was born in Pengcheng commandery. Her son Cao Ju was enfeoffed in her home commandery. Lady Huan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
